curation_notes: Patch modifies only Utils.java (1 non-test file). The compileMustache method hardcoded escapeHTML(false), disabling Mustache's built-in HTML escaping. The fix adds an escapeHtml parameter. No sibling files share this pattern — compileMustache is defined only in Utils.java. Vulnerability class xss confirmed from CWE-79 and the patch which adds HTML escaping to template output.
